notes:
Production correctness pass — DSV3.2 + Mistral 4 + Kimi K2.6 fp32 SDPA, JANG_4K allocator, Ling-2.6-flash runtime, MiniMax expert-padding live verified.

- Bundled mlx_lm now ships the fp32 SDPA absorb branch in deepseek_v3 / deepseek_v32 / mistral4. Without it, MLA-family L==1 decode silently produces wrong logits on bf16 weights. Vendored as a controlled fork at panel/scripts/patches/, hard-failing the build if the patch source is missing.

- New runtime: Ling-2.6-flash / Bailing-V2.5 (`bailing_hybrid` model_type). Hybrid attention pattern (4 MLA layers + 28 Lightning-Attn-2 GLA layers + MTP head), 256-expert MoE with sigmoid+grouped routing. Engine registry wires it as cache_type=hybrid, deepseek_r1 reasoning, deepseek tool parser, default `detailed thinking off` per chat template.

- jang_tools 2.5.19: `allocate_bits_budget` JANG_4K (and other K-quant ≥4-bit) profiles no longer downgrade routed expert MLPs (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj) below the namesake bit width on 256+ expert MoE. JANG_4K now matches JANG_4M behaviour on MoE — slight overshoot vs strict budget, but no rarely-activated 3-bit experts → no repetition loops on trivial prompts. 2-/3-bit profiles unaffected.

- MiniMax-M2.7-Small JANGTQ artifact alignment: `pad_minimax_jangtq_experts` migration tool pads non-32-aligned routed-expert counts in place (154→160), with -10000 dummy bias on padded rows and inert zeroed TQ tensors for dummy experts. Verified across all 62 layers. Speed: 38 t/s warmed-bench → audit-doc target of 40 t/s. Coherence verified across multi-turn.

- Cache stack live-verified on MiniMax M2.7-Small with --continuous-batching: paged hits T2 73-tok / T3 64-tok / fresh-request 51-tok; disk L2 wrote 6 blocks (114 MB); 1.74x speedup on warm-prefix. DSV4 fast-load via pre-stacked sidecar 15 s. Both deepseek_v32 and mistral4 fp32 SDPA cast verified post-install.

- Misc: VMLX_MODELS_DIR canonical env var (with VMLINUX_MODELS_DIR backward-compat); Ollama gateway image-translation + cache_salt/skip_prefix_cache passthrough + reasoning_content→thinking + tool-call argument JSON.parse; SSM companion cache prefix-cache-disabled gate; Anthropic Omni streaming via AnthropicStreamAdapter; Responses API suppressed-reasoning tool extraction; DSV4 SwitchGLU patch idempotent + sidecar runtime_patch fingerprint.
